things.name: Gulangyu Island
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage car-free island with European and Chinese architecture and piano culture

things.name: Nanputuo Temple
things.description: Tang dynasty Buddhist temple on the mountain with a vegetarian restaurant

things.name: Piano Museum on Gulangyu
things.description: Collection of 100 pianos from around the world in a colonial villa

things.name: Zhongshan Road Pedestrian Street
things.description: Colonial-era covered arcade shopping street - China's finest 1920s commercial architecture

things.name: Xiamen University Campus
things.description: One of China's most beautiful campuses with a colonial-influenced architecture

things.name: Wanshi Botanical Garden
things.description: Hilltop botanical garden with bamboo forest, exotic plants and lake views

things.name: Jimei School Village (Turtle Garden)
things.description: Educational complex founded by overseas Chinese with a fascinating museum

things.name: Quanzhou Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Silk Road port with a mosque built by Arab merchants in 1009

things.name: Hulishan Fortress (Fort)
things.description: 1891 coastal fortress with the world's largest surviving coastal cannon

things.name: Shacha Noodles
things.description: Xiamen's unique noodle dish with satay-style seafood broth - local breakfast staple
